steps.title: Spot the concession signal
steps.content: ”Still” at the start of the third sentence signals that the second sentence introduces a limitation or exception to the first claim.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Granted,” is the only choice that simultaneously acknowledges the first claim and introduces its limitation: architects championed nature, but these specific features couldn't grow in a forest. The other options fail to set up this relationship: “Similarly” suggests the points align, “Furthermore” treats it as additional evidence, and “Thus” implies causation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
